FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct InfoBar.InfoBarTemplateSettings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

The TemplateSettings convention (per the audit's P3) - the per-severity computed geometry WinUI binds into its severity VisualState: the standard status glyph, the icon-background fill (SystemFillColorBrush), the inverse glyph foreground, and the tinted content-root background (SystemFillColorBackgroundBrush). Computed once per severity by the pure factory For(InfoBarSeverity) - no per-frame allocation.

public readonly record struct InfoBar.InfoBarTemplateSettings : IEquatable<InfoBar.InfoBarTemplateSettings>
Implements
IEquatable<InfoBar.InfoBarTemplateSettings>

Constructors

InfoBarTemplateSettings(string, ColorF, ColorF, ColorF)

The TemplateSettings convention (per the audit's P3) - the per-severity computed geometry WinUI binds into its severity VisualState: the standard status glyph, the icon-background fill (SystemFillColorBrush), the inverse glyph foreground, and the tinted content-root background (SystemFillColorBackgroundBrush). Computed once per severity by the pure factory For(InfoBarSeverity) - no per-frame allocation.

InfoBar.InfoBarTemplateSettings
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
